recalls.Description: Daikin Comfort Technologies is recalling specific models of heat pumps including the Daikin FIT, Amana S-Series, and Goodman SD due to a potential risk of excessive heat exposure. These beige units have the model name displayed on their exterior, and the model number can be found on the serial plate located on the side. The affected model numbers include various combinations such as DZ6VSA1810-AA, ASZS601810-AA, and more.
recalls.Title: Daikin Comfort Technologies Recalls Daikin FIT, Amana S-Series, and Goodman SD Heat Pumps Due to Excessive Heat Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach DCT toll-free at 855-545-0235 from 8 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. More information is available online at http://www.goodmanmfg.com/fit-recall or https://daikincomfort.com/ by selecting "Product Recalls" at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Daikin FIT Heat Pump
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 56,000 (In addition, about 5,522 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Amana Brand S-series heat pump
Location of model number on serial plate on side of unit
Location of model number on serial plate

Manufacturers.Name: Daikin Comfort Technologies Manufacturing L.P., of Houston, Texas

Retailers.Name: Available through independent heating and cooling dealers across the country from May 2022 to April 2024, priced between $2,200 and $5,700.

Hazards.Name: Risk of excessive heat exposure due to power interruption

Remedies.Name: Remote software update for WiFi-connected systems; registration for non-WiFi systems

recalls.metaDescription: Daikin recalls heat pumps due to excessive heat risk. Check model numbers and contact for updates.

recalls.Description: Daikin Comfort Technologies is recalling packaged air conditioning and heat pump units under the Amana, Daikin, and Goodman brands. These units, which are either gray or green, can be identified by their model number located on the electrical connection side of the unit's exterior. To check if your unit is affected by this recall, please visit www.goodmanmfg.com/package-recall.
recalls.Title: Daikin Comfort Technologies Recalls Amana, Daikin, and Goodman Air Conditioning and Heat Pump Units Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact DCT toll-free at 833-324-5460 from 8 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. Additional information is available online at www.goodmanmfg.com/package-recall or by visiting www.goodmanmfg.com and selecting "PRODUCT RECALL."

Products.Name: Amana, Daikin, and Goodman Packaged Air Conditioning Units

Images.Caption: Recalled Goodman branded air conditioning and heat pump
Recalled air conditioning and heat pump model number label location

Manufacturers.Name: Daikin Comfort Technologies Manufacturing L.P. (f/k/a Goodman Manufacturing Company L.P.), of Houston, Texas

Retailers.Name: Independent dealers of heating and cooling equipment across the nation, sold from January 2024 through March 2024, priced between $4,500 and $7,500.

Hazards.Name: Incorrect electrical ratings on the unit's serial plate, which may lead to improper wiring and a fire hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should refrain from opening the outside electrical panel of the recalled units and should contact Daikin Comfort Technologies Manufacturing L.P. (DCT) for a complimentary repair and inspection. DCT will reach out to all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Daikin recalls Amana, Daikin, and Goodman air conditioning units due to fire hazards. Check if your unit is affected and contact for repairs.
